pointer_reinterpretation_status.supported_contract: read-only 32-bit scalar storage backing reinterpreted through aligned 8-, 16-, or 32-bit scalar views, including non-zero source element offsets

captured_callback_status.supported_contract: dispatch_bool callbacks with one integral-constant parameter are expanded into runtime branches with branch-local compile-time values

compile_time_loop_status.supported_contract: concrete const_for_loop callbacks with verified integral_constant, Int alias, recursive helper, arithmetic operator, and implicit value-conversion contracts; integral start, stop, and step values; reference capture; one auto integral-constant parameter; ordered nested expansion; and callback-local bare returns lowered to per-iteration escapes outside ordinary loops and switches
compile_time_loop_status.unresolved_callbacks: value returns and callback-owned loop, switch, break, continue, or goto control remain preserved

template_alias_status.supported_contract: bounded non-variadic namespace-scope alias templates with lexical namespace lookup, default argument substitution, chained expansion, and template-parameter shadowing
template_alias_status.struct_owned_alias_template_supported_co: concrete non-variadic struct-owned alias templates with declaring-owner retention, default argument substitution, dependent owner integral constants, cross-owner alias chains, and namespace-qualified or nested owner disambiguation
template_alias_status.plain_helper_supported_contract: call-site deduction through unnamed parameters, empty braced type values, and proven lexical integral constants
template_alias_status.callback_handoff_supported_contract: verified dispatch_bool helpers with only reachable lambda calls defer to structured frontend callback lowering

wide_vector_aggregate_lowering.representation: fixed aggregate wrapper with explicit lane storage and element-wise helpers

post_materialization_translation.feature: empty initializer on unresolved dependent static call

struct_scoped_cast_alias_status.supported_contract: concrete struct-owned using and typedef aliases in C-style and named cast targets, including qualified owner references, lexical shadowing, and alias targets that contain pointer qualifiers

function_local_alias_status.supported_contract: lexically scoped function-body using and typedef aliases that resolve to concrete scalar or vector types, including declarations, constructors, casts, array element types, and generic static-member owners

generic_member_call_status.supported_contract: member and pointer-member calls with ordered type and value arguments, including nested generic types and parenthesized integral values
generic_member_call_status.materialization_contract: concrete template methods on direct or nested struct-field receivers are emitted as dependency-ordered target helpers
generic_member_call_status.unresolved_call_contract: unmaterialized generic member calls fail with receiver, method, target, and argument details
